[cron:81a592ec-c0a4-4cd8-8f45-45a58df95096 overnight-worker-cycle-0000] Midnight reminder: run worker cycle again, prioritize job-hunt and company-research freshness, and append a short checkpoint summary.
Current time: Tuesday, March 10th, 2026 — 12:00 AM (America/Chicago) / 2026-03-10 05:00 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

Midnight worker cycle completed. Prioritized job-hunt and company-research freshness. Updated latest job listings and refreshed company data sources. Appended checkpoint summary to records. Ready for next cycle.
